description: These stylish white and red  sneakers from puma make a trendy statement, combining superior performance. These are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. You can also team these with jeans and tees for a stylishly casual look.Upper Nylon and suede upper with round toe box Lace-up front with padded tongue and collar for snug Fit Extra cushioned heel patch to protect ankle from twisting Textile lining and cushioned insole Logo detail and puma signature side stripe Midsole Cushioned EVA midsole for shock absorption Outsole Durable rubber traction outsole extending from forefoot to heel counter for firm support Rounded, small rubber lugs all over outsole for superior grip and big rubber lugs near the toes for extensive training
